Lines.Text: [color=#ffff00]> NEWS_FEED.TXT[/color] [color=#00cc00]robo-tek daily - archived[/color] ---  [color=#ffff00]ROBO-TEK UNVEILS NEW SLOGAN[/color]  in a press event held yesterday at corporate headquarters, ROBO-TEK CEO skimley p. wrenchworth announced the company's new motto:  [color=#ffff00]"a brighter tomorrow."[/color]  when asked what this meant, wrenchworth reportedly smiled, gestured vaguely at a nearby plant, and had security escort the journalist out of the building.  the plant was also fired.  end of file.
